message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Values and Religion in Civil Society: The Case of Jordan 2010","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11865","justification":"Explicitly focused on values and religion; fielded in Jordan in 2010 (within 2010s). GESIS dataset with detailed modules on religious beliefs, practices, and value orientations in a listed target country."},{"title":"World Values Survey 2010–2014 (Wave 6): Algeria","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12253","justification":"World Values Survey wave 6 fielded in 2013–2014 in Algeria; contains extensive items on religion, religious practice, and personal values. Algeria is one of the requested countries and the period is 2010s."},{"title":"World Values Survey 2010–2014 (Wave 6): Ghana","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12245","justification":"Ghana WVS wave 6 (2011–2013) covers religious affiliation, practice, and broad value orientations (moral, social, political). Ghana is explicitly requested and timing is in the 2010s."},{"title":"World Values Survey 2010–2014 (Wave 6): Indonesia","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12250","justification":"Indonesia round of WVS wave 6 (fielded 2011–2013) includes rich modules on religiosity, religious tolerance, and value change. Indonesia is one of the target countries and fieldwork is in the 2010s."},{"title":"World Values Survey 2010–2014 (Wave 6): Jordan","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12249","justification":"WVS wave 6 in Jordan (around 2014) focuses on individual and societal values, including religion, moral norms, and social values. Jordan is one of the listed countries and the survey falls in the 2010s."},{"title":"World Values Survey 2010–2014 (Wave 6): Malaysia","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12255","justification":"Malaysian WVS wave 6 dataset covers religious beliefs/practices and a wide range of value questions (family, politics, morality). Malaysia is in the requested list and fieldwork took place in the 2010s."},{"title":"World Values Survey 2010–2014 (Wave 6): Nigeria","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12258","justification":"Nigeria round of WVS wave 6 (2011–2013) includes standard WVS modules on religion and values. Nigeria is among the specified countries and the data collection is in the 2010s."},{"title":"World Values Survey 2010–2014 (Wave 6): Singapore","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12259","justification":"Singapore WVS wave 6 study (around 2012) examines religious identification, practice, and value orientations. Singapore is in the country list and the time frame is 2010s."},{"title":"World Values Survey 2010–2014 (Wave 6): Viet Nam","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12263","justification":"Viet Nam WVS wave 6 dataset, fielded in the early–mid 2010s, includes detailed questions on religion, beliefs, and personal as well as societal values. Viet Nam is one of the requested countries."},{"title":"World Values Survey 2010–2014 (Wave 6): Kenya","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12252","justification":"Kenya wave 6 of the World Values Survey conducted during the 2010s; covers religious affiliation, practice, and many value dimensions. Kenya is one of the specified countries and the period is 2010s."}]}
